contentBlocks.original:
आपदामपहर्तारं दातारं सर्वसम्पदाम्
लोकाभिरामं श्रीरामं भूयो भूयो नमाम्यहम्
contentBlocks.transliteration:
āpadāmapahartāraṃ dātāraṃ sarvasampadām
lokābhirāmaṃ śrīrāmaṃ bhūyo bhūyo namāmyaham
contentBlocks.translation: I repeatedly bow to Śrī Rāma, the remover of all difficulties and the bestower of all wealth, who is delightful to all the worlds.
contentBlocks.meanings: आपदामपहर्तारं (āpadām-apahartāram) – remover of difficulties (āpadām:of difficulties | apahartāram:remover); दातारं (dātāram) – bestower; सर्वसम्पदाम् (sarvasampadām) – of all wealth (sarva:all | sampadām:of wealth); लोकाभिरामं (lokābhirāmam) – delightful to all worlds (loka:worlds | abhirāmam:delightful to); श्रीरामं (śrīrāmam) – Śrī Rāma (śrī:Śrī | rāmam:Rāma); भूयो (bhūyo) – again; भूयो (bhūyo) – again; नमामि (namāmi) – I bow; अहम् (aham) – I;
